title: ADULT OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH ALBANY ADULT OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include mental health evaluations, support groups, care coordination, individual and group therapy counseling, co-occurring disorder treatment, and medication management for adults with serious and persistent mental illness. 445 3rd Avenue SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 497-6205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 497-6205 Toll-free (800) 304-7468 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD OUTPATIENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LINN COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH ALBANY
